heading: Calculating a sequestration
label: 935 Calculating a sequestration
notes: References in TextSection 11, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), means , which amended .section 11 of Pub. L. 111–139section 905 of this title
amendments: References in TextSection 11, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), means , which amended .section 11 of Pub. L. 111–139section 905 of this title

children.heading: Reducing nonexempt budgetary resources by a uniform percentage
children.label: a Reducing nonexempt budgetary resources by a uniform percentage

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: OMB shall calculate the uniform percentage by which the budgetary resources of nonexempt direct spending programs are to be sequestered such that the outlay savings resulting from that sequestration, as calculated under subsection (b), shall offset the budget-year debit, if any, on the applicable PAYGO scorecard. If the uniform percentage calculated under the prior sentence exceeds 4 percent, the Medicare programs described in shall be reduced by 4 percent and the uniform percentage by which the budgetary resources of all other nonexempt direct spending programs are to be sequestered shall be increased, as necessary, so that the sequestration of Medicare and of all other nonexempt direct spending programs together produce the required outlay savings.section 906(d) of this title

children.heading: Programs and activities in unified budget only
children.label: 2 Programs and activities in unified budget only
children.text: Subject to the exemptions set forth in section 11, OMB shall determine the uniform percentage required under paragraph (1) with respect to programs and activities contained in the unified budget only.1See References in Text note below.1
the amount by which the sequestration in a crop year of crop support payments, pursuant to , reduces outlays in the budget year and the subsequent fiscal year;section 906(j) of this title

the amount by which the sequestration of Medicare payments in the 12-month period following the sequestration order, pursuant to , reduces outlays in the budget year and the subsequent fiscal year; andsection 906(d) of this title
the amount by which the sequestration in the budget year of the budgetary resources of other nonexempt mandatory programs reduces outlays in the budget year and in the subsequent fiscal year.
